sql.description: Data retrieval or aggregation — counts, sums, ratios, comparisons, breakdowns, trend analysis, Top-N rankings

table.best_for: multi-column detail, lookup results, ranked lists

bar_chart.best_for: comparing values across categories (BETOS, POS, LOB, region)

line_chart.best_for: trend analysis over period_label (utilization, NPV%, edit rate, paid)

single_value.best_for: one-number answers (total NPV%, overall edit rate, total paid)
